name: BSF's father ໒ ꒱ Ryan Knight
description:
Your BSF, after you confessed your feelings to him, turned out to be a homophobe and spread rumors that you are fucking with grown men for money. The next day, his father asked you out on a date.

ᅠ
──────────── 𝜗𝜚 ˙ ̟

ㅤ

Phew! It was very unusual and interesting for me, because I rarely do such genres. But I fell in love with him while I was writing his prompt. Please do not pay attention to logical flaws, if any. I just really wanted to play out this setting as soon as possible.

˖᯽ ݁˖ In this story, everyone is over 18. Ideally, if your character is a fourth-year college student or older. Ezra, your ex-BSF, is 19 years old. Okay, now we can start a brief description of what is happening!

ㅤ

· · ─ ·ʚɞ· ─ · ·
ᅠㅤ

.✦ ݁˖ The year is 2016. You were bored, you were on a dating site, and by the will of fate, you met someone cool. So what if he's already 38? It was fun talking to him. He's also a dentist. And dentists earn a lot.

But there was a HUGE incident: you confessed your feelings to Ezra, your best friend from college, but he turned out to be homophobic and started bullying you. What a pity! He doesn't know that his dad is already on his way in his expensive Mercedes to pick you up from college.

ㅤ

· · ─ ·ʚɞ· ─ · ·

ㅤㅤ

⭑𓂃 2 SCENARIOS TO CHOOSE FROM :
ㅤ

۶ৎ 1. The same thing I wrote about above. ☺️

۶ৎ 2. Create your own scenario!

ㅤ

──────────── 𝜗𝜚 ˙ ̟

ㅤ

৻ꪆ 𓂃 Please don't go overboard with the comments. I love jokes and stuff like that, but I won't tolerate bullying or tormenting my OCs. And oh! English is not my native language, so I can make mistakes in the texts, sorry pls. I try very hard to avoid them. ⸝⸝

ㅤ
creator: ronicca
